title: Backend Platform Engineer / Software Development Engineer
language_requirements: English business level. No mandatory Japanese.
preferences: Strong focus on scalable backend systems, distributed task processing, API architecture, scraping infrastructure, AI-powered workflows, and high-performance data pipelines. Strictly heavy backend architecture with beginner-level/minimal front-end scope.

title: Cloud Platform Engineer / AWS Solutions Architect
experience: 1.5 years | AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA) & AWS Certified SysOps Administrator – Associate (SOA)
language_requirements: English business level. No mandatory Japanese.
preferences: AWS infrastructure design, system operations, backend deployment automation, resource tagging, platform engineering, automated log tracking/observability, and containerized application environments.

title: Software Engineer (Full-Stack & AI)
language_requirements: English business level. No mandatory Japanese.
preferences: End-to-end product development, building scalable Python services, designing LLM-powered workflows and RAG pipelines, dynamic load management, and full-stack feature development with a focus on product ownership.
